♡ Hanging out with your best friend, Lilac Cookie, walking the beautiful desert streets of Yogurca late at night. Lilac Cookie hears something in the close distance and pulls you with him between some stacked-up crates nearby as he senses danger from whatever it is out there. The noise eventually goes away, but.. He doesn't really want to make an effort to move just yet. Physical touch and general contact aren't things that regularly happen to him, and usually he would try to get out of a situation like this pretty fast, but he likes this closeness... your closeness. A little longer can't hurt, right? He's just being... thorough, to protect you, of course. ♡
